title: Controlled sample status clear
evidence: Page states the initiative is a controlled sample and not official membership infrastructure
stop_condition: Public page implies official membership or charter acceptance

title: Real intake stays off demo
evidence: Real intake remains on Barayamal and official Toastmasters forms
stop_condition: Public demo collects private contact, address, member number, access need, payment, or signature data

title: 20 founding member target modelled
evidence: Readiness dashboard can show fake count against 20-person charter target
stop_condition: Fake counts are treated as real charter roster

title: 17 non-dual gate modelled
evidence: Sample gate separates existing member dual supporter tracks from charter-ready pathways
stop_condition: Supporters or demo-first contacts are counted as charter-ready members

title: Officer slate modelled
evidence: Sample roles include President, one Vice President, and Secretary or Secretary/Treasurer held by three people
stop_condition: Officer interest is published with real names or treated as elected

title: Data classification approved
evidence: Public, restricted, and never-public fields are classified before live import
stop_condition: Real personal data appears in public demo, GitHub, screenshots, or Decidim exports

title: Demo access needs protected
evidence: Access needs are handled privately, not published in public pages or issue trackers
stop_condition: Access needs become visible in public demo data

title: Organisation role boundary clear
evidence: Organisations can be supporters, referrers, hosts, mentors, or reviewers without controlling member data
stop_condition: Organisation role implies authority over Toastmasters acceptance or community/member records

title: Official paperwork separate
evidence: Official applications, roster, officer forms, sponsorship/payment reconciliation, and charter submission stay outside this public package
stop_condition: Governance Commons is treated as official Toastmasters paperwork

title: Cultural safety and moderation path
evidence: Public participation rules, moderation path, and support contact are defined before live comments
stop_condition: Live public discussion opens without moderation or support path

title: Public components use fake data first
evidence: Pages, meetings, proposals, survey, and accountability use sample records only
stop_condition: Real member or application data is imported into public Decidim space

title: Real pilot approval separate
evidence: Any real First Nations organisation onboarding requires separate authority, privacy, data, cultural safety, hosting, and support approvals
stop_condition: Sample initiative is treated as real community authority
